since_last: 47% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.29%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 47% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.07% · BTC -2.96% · Gold +0.37% · Nasdaq100 +0.51%. 47% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.29%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.29%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.97%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +20.06%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +20.06%, LRCX +3.32%, KLAC +3.30%, ASML +3.00%, AMBA +2.97%. Laggards: DLR -4.69%, TTD -3.49%, NOW -2.03%, EQIX -2.02%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.15% at $162.31
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
